# ccpod

> ccpod runs Claude Code inside a Docker container with portable, versioned profiles. Share, reproduce, and pin your Claude environment across machines and teams.

ccpod is an open-source CLI that wraps [Claude Code](https://docs.claude.com/en/docs/claude-code) in a container-based profile system. A profile bundles the container image, auth credentials, Claude settings, plugins, skills, CLAUDE.md, MCP servers, network policy, and sidecar services into a single versionable unit. Works with Docker, OrbStack, Colima, and Podman — the runtime is auto-detected.

## Documentation

- [Introduction](https://ccpod.brnby.com/getting-started/introduction/): What ccpod is, what problem it solves, and when to use it.
- [Installation](https://ccpod.brnby.com/getting-started/installation/): Install from a release binary or build from source. Covers runtime detection order.
- [Quick Start](https://ccpod.brnby.com/getting-started/quick-start/): Set up ccpod and run your first Claude session in under five minutes.
- [Profiles Overview](https://ccpod.brnby.com/profiles/overview/): A profile is the unit of portability — bundles image, auth, config, plugins, network, and state mode.
- [Profile Configuration](https://ccpod.brnby.com/profiles/configuration/): Full reference for profile.yml fields.
- [Shared Team Profile](https://ccpod.brnby.com/profiles/team/): Point a profile at a git repo so every teammate gets the same CLAUDE.md, settings, and plugins.
- [Project Config Overview](https://ccpod.brnby.com/project-config/overview/): .ccpod.yml lives in a repo and overlays the profile for that project.
- [Merge Strategies](https://ccpod.brnby.com/project-config/merge/): deep-merge vs override strategies for combining profile and project config.
- [State Persistence](https://ccpod.brnby.com/features/state/): Keep Claude history, projects, and sessions between container runs.
- [MCP Auto-detection](https://ccpod.brnby.com/features/mcp/): Expose Model Context Protocol server ports automatically from .mcp.json.
- [Network Policy](https://ccpod.brnby.com/features/network/): Restrict or allow outbound network access for Claude inside the container.
- [Sidecar Services](https://ccpod.brnby.com/features/sidecars/): Declare Postgres, Redis, or any service alongside Claude with shared networking.
- [SSH Forwarding](https://ccpod.brnby.com/features/ssh/): Forward SSH agent from host to the Claude container.
- [CLI Reference](https://ccpod.brnby.com/reference/cli/): Every ccpod command and flag (run, init, update, profile, plugins, image, config, ps, down).
- [Architecture](https://ccpod.brnby.com/reference/architecture/): How the ccpod pipeline turns a profile + project config into a running Claude container.
- [Storage Layout](https://ccpod.brnby.com/reference/storage/): Where ccpod stores profiles, credentials, state, and plugin volumes.

## Install

```sh
curl -fsSL https://ccpod.brnby.com/install.sh | sh
ccpod init
ccpod run
```

## Source

https://github.com/yorch/ccpod
